sub_pixel_system.notes: Sports golf game; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Golf Shot System
special_mechanics.description: Power meter-based swing mechanic. Player times button press to stop marker at desired power level, then second button press determines shot type (spin/trajectory). Wind and ball spin affect trajectory.

special_mechanics.name: Camera System
special_mechanics.description: Hybrid perspective: bird's-eye view for club/direction selection, third-person view during swing execution, top-down view for putting

special_mechanics.name: Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Ball travel affected by selected club, wind conditions, terrain lies, and applied spin

tier_notes: Tier 3 (T3) - Empirical/Qualitative data. No precise physics parameters, gravity, or movement values documented in available sources. Game is golf simulation with power meter mechanics; player character movement not primary gameplay mechanic. Sources contain gameplay descriptions and development notes but no technical physics data.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (NES Open Tournament Golf article)
wikipedia - NES Open Tournament Golf article
